query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM field_visits) as field_visits_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fr_expenses) as fr_expenses_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bdr_expenses) as bdr_expenses_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM referral_rewards) as referral_rewards_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fr_errands) as fr_errands_count;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NLuybDd1Z2YoG9.root --database mD5oQ9mnwHpgnRSzNG9WvW --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM field_visits) as field_visits_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fr_expenses) as fr_expenses_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bdr_expenses) as bdr_expenses_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM referral_rewards) as referral_rewards_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fr_errands) as fr_errands_count;
